svg.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.title: Prototype: Queues page with live mini-pipelines
svg.desc: Mockup of the dashboard's queues page where each queue row contains a mini-pipeline SVG driven by a periodic snapshot poll. Four queues are shown in four different states: healthy steady flow, one stuck partition, very high throughput, and a stalled queue with a growing DLQ. Each row also shows numeric metrics and a 1-hour sparkline.

g.text: Filter queues by name, namespace, task...
PROTOTYPE NOTE • NOT IN PRODUCTION YET
No SSE / WebSocket required. HTTP polling at the existing dashboard cadence (5-10s) is sufficient because the local engine ease-transitions between rates.
